title: Spicy Vietnamese Chicken Pho
description: A spicy twist on the traditional Vietnamese dish, featuring chicken, rice noodles, and a flavorful broth.
instructions: Bring the pho broth to a boil in a large pot over high heat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add the ga pow, sugar, and fish sauce. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Assemble the pho by placing cooked noodles in a bowl, then adding slices of chicken and ladling hot broth over the top.
Serve with lime wedges and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
